path.style: stroke: rgb(187, 190, 191); stroke-width: 2px; fill: none; opacity: 0.85; stroke-dasharray: 5px, 3px;

rect.style: fill: rgb(18, 19, 20); stroke: rgb(229, 231, 235); stroke-width: 3px; stroke-dasharray: 6, 3;

text.style: font-size: 9px; fill: rgb(45, 138, 110);font-family: "Segoe WPC", "Segoe UI", sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, sans-serif; font-weight: 400;

font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; fill: rgb(187, 190, 191); font-family: "Segoe WPC", "Segoe UI", sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, sans-serif;

rect.style: fill: rgb(18, 19, 20); stroke: rgb(229, 231, 235); stroke-width: 2px; stroke-dasharray: none;

text.style: font-size: 9px; fill: rgb(45, 138, 110);font-family: "Segoe WPC", "Segoe UI", sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, sans-serif; font-weight: 400;

font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; fill: rgb(187, 190, 191); font-family: "Segoe WPC", "Segoe UI", sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, sans-serif;

font-size: 10px; font-style: italic; fill: rgb(47, 111, 221);font-family: "Segoe WPC", "Segoe UI", sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, sans-serif; font-weight: 400;

rect.style: fill: transparent; stroke: rgb(229, 231, 235); stroke-width: 1.5px; stroke-dasharray: none; opacity: 0.9;

text.style: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; fill: rgb(229, 231, 235);font-family: "Segoe WPC", "Segoe UI", sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, sans-serif;
